events.title: Claude Cowork and Claude Code usage limits boosted (Jun–Aug 2026 promotion)
events.excerpt: Weekly Claude Code limit raised 50% through Aug 19 and Cowork limit raised 100% through Aug 5; limits return to standard amounts when each promotion ends.

events.title: Claude Code weekly limits kept 50% higher through August 19
events.excerpt: We're also keeping Claude Code weekly limits 50% higher, now through August 19, for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.

events.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex usage limits reset again, “Oops... I did it again”
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Oops... I did it again. Enjoy reset usage limits for all paid users for Codex and ChatGPT Work.” Latest in a string of resets during the GPT-5.6 Sol demand surge.

events.title: One-time $100 usage credit for Pro/Team Standard users as Fable 5 moves to credits-only
events.excerpt: As included Fable 5 access ends for Pro and Team Standard plans on July 20, Anthropic is issuing those subscribers a one-time $100 usage credit to keep using Fable 5 at API rates ($10/$50 per million input/output tokens); Max and Team Premium keep Fable 5 included at 50% of weekly limits.

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset for all users — third week running
events.excerpt: Third blanket reset in three weeks; reporting says the notice used the same wording as July 9.

events.title: Codex and ChatGPT Work usage limits reset for 9M active-user milestone
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Another reset for our Codex and ChatGPT Work users. Actually hit 9M active users way earlier today... Should have that sweet 100% weekly usage limit back in a few [minutes].”

events.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex usage limits reset for 8M active-user milestone
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “We have reached 8M active users across Codex and ChatGPT Work. We are once again resetting the usage limits for all. And we continue to not have the 5h rate limit as well.”

events.title: Banked usage reset granted to all Codex and ChatGPT Work users for 7M-user milestone
events.excerpt: To celebrate 7M active users, OpenAI added a banked reset to every Codex and ChatGPT Work account; applying it (desktop app or web) replenishes the weekly usage allowance on the user's own schedule.

events.title: Banked reset granted to 500,000 ChatGPT Work and Codex users after a reset-button bug
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): after launching banked-reset access on web and mobile (previously desktop-only), a bug meant fewer than 10% of users who pressed reset during a roughly 2-hour window didn't actually get one; rather than track down exactly who was affected, OpenAI added a banked reset to every account that pressed the button in that window — about 500,000 users.

events.title: 5-hour usage cap temporarily removed on ChatGPT Plus, Pro, and Business
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Temporarily removing the 5 hour usage limit restriction for all Plus, Business and Pro plans” for Codex and ChatGPT Work, alongside GPT-5.6 Sol efficiency changes and a usage reset for the 6M active-user milestone landing within the hour. Weekly limits remained in place.

events.title: Claude Fable 5 access and 50% higher Claude Code weekly limits extended through July 19
events.excerpt: We're extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans, as well as keeping Claude Code’s weekly rate limits 50% higher, through July 19.

events.title: Another ChatGPT Work and Codex usage limit reset over the weekend
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Introducing... another usage limit reset for all our ChatGPT Work and Codex users. Should land over next 30 minutes... we have never seen traffic increase so quickly.”

events.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex usage limits reset again, second reset promised same day
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Hello beautiful people! We have reset usage limits across Codex and ChatGPT Work. And another one will come later in the day.”

events.title: ChatGPT Work and Codex usage limits reset ahead of GPT-5.6 Sol demand surge
events.excerpt: Tibo Sottiaux (OpenAI): “Enjoy a full reset of your usage limits for ChatGPT Work and Codex. Propagating in the next hour.” Applies to all paid ChatGPT Work and Codex users during a run of resets after the GPT-5.6 Sol launch.

events.title: “We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users.”
events.excerpt: Blanket reset announced on the official ClaudeDevs X account after a rough week of outages; time recovered from the post id.

events.title: Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans extended through July 12
events.excerpt: We're extending access to Claude Fable 5 on all paid plans through July 12.

events.title: Doubled Claude Cowork usage limits extended through August 5
events.excerpt: We're extending doubled Cowork usage limits through August 5, so you can delegate bigger work to Claude. Read more: https://claude.com/blog/cowork-web-mobile/

events.title: Claude Code weekly limits increased by 50% through July 13
events.excerpt: Anthropic raised Claude Code weekly limits by 50% for a limited period.

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset for all users
events.excerpt: First of three weekly blanket resets in July; announced on the official ClaudeDevs X account, time recovered from the post id.

events.title: Claude Fable 5 included in paid plans at up to 50% of weekly usage limit
events.excerpt: Fable 5 usage drew from existing Pro/Max/Team/Enterprise weekly limits at no extra charge, up to 50% of the weekly cap before requiring usage credits. Originally through July 7, the window was extended to July 12 and then to July 19, 2026 at 11:59:59 PM PT.

events.title: Codex usage limits fully reset with one additional banked reset
events.excerpt: Codex usage limits will be fully reset again in the next hour and we will credit one additional reset into your bank for your own usage over the next 24 hours. We investigated reports that Codex usage was being consumed faster than expected. There wasn't one central issue, but a few smaller problems compounded for some users. Here's what we found and changed: - Actual usage: Auto-review had become more proactive, another change was triggering more subagent work, and background suggestions could

events.title: Codex usage limits hard-reset for everyone during incident investigation
events.excerpt: OpenAI's Codex lead reset everyone's Codex usage limits while an issue was investigated — a hard reset, since some users had stacked up to three banked resets they can apply on their own schedule.

events.title: Codex usage reset granted to all users during a usage-drain investigation
events.excerpt: We are giving all Codex users a usage reset on the house. Should be showing in your accounts in the next few hours. We have applied some mitigations, but our investigation hasn't shown users being impacted at large. We are continuing to monitor the situation.

events.title: 5-hour and weekly usage limits reset for everyone, across all plans
events.excerpt: ClaudeDevs: "Update: we've gone ahead and reset 5-hour and weekly usage limits for everyone, across all plans. Enjoy your weekend!"

events.title: Double reset: a full Codex reset plus one banked reset
events.excerpt: Dearest gentle codexer. We did a sneaky double reset. Not only do you get a full reset on us. But you are also getting one into the reset bank to use at your own leisure. Enjoy

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset for all users at Fable 5 launch
events.excerpt: We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all users. Enjoy Fable 5!

events.title: Claude Cowork usage limits doubled for one month
events.excerpt: We've doubled usage limits in Claude Cowork for the next month. Delegate bigger, more complex tasks to Claude.

events.title: Codex usage limits reset across all paid plans after three reliability incidents
events.excerpt: Hi. Over the last 24 hours we had three separate small incidents that affected Codex reliability. Those are three too many and we are taking active steps for them to not reproduce. I have reset usage limits for Codex across all paid plans. May the tokens flow again.

events.title: $1,000 usage credits per user for first-time Claude Code/Cowork activation (Enterprise)
events.excerpt: Usage-based Claude Enterprise orgs: every user who activates Claude Code or Cowork for the first time between June 2 and July 2, 2026 (11:59:59 PM PT) gets $1,000 in usage credits for that user's Claude Code and Cowork usage; credits expire 90 days after issuance, capped at 10,000 seats per org.

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset for Pro and Max users after subagent bug
events.excerpt: Anthropic reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits for all Pro and Max users after fixing an issue that caused some Claude Code sessions to spawn excessive parallel subagents, burning through usage faster than expected.

events.title: Codex usage limits reset to 100% weekly and hourly for all paid subscriptions
events.excerpt: The Codex usage limits have been reset for all paid ChatGPT subscriptions. You should be back to 100% weekly and 100% hourly limits. Let the tokens do incredible things today and have fun.

events.title: Codex usage limits reset after a cache-hit regression drained limits faster
events.excerpt: Some of you noticed limits drained faster in Codex, we root caused it to an optimization that we rolled back that had an impact on cache hit rates when compacting across long running sessions. We fixed this and have now reset usage limits for all accounts. Enjoy the weekend.

events.title: Codex usage limits reset across all paid plans
events.excerpt: Codex usage limits have now been reset across all paid plans. Enjoy the weekend!

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset for everyone
events.excerpt: Happy Friday! We've reset everyone's 5-hour and weekly rate limits.

events.title: Claude Code weekly limits increased 50% through July 13
events.excerpt: Claude Code weekly limits are increasing 50%, now through July 13. Live now for all Pro, Max, Team, and seat-based Enterprise users.

events.title: Two months of free Codex usage for companies switching over
events.excerpt: Sam Altman: for the next 30 days (from May 13, 2026), companies that want to try switching to Codex get two months of free Codex usage; sign-up via OpenAI's enterprise promo form.

events.title: Codex rate limits reset for all paid plans to build more with GPT-5.5
events.excerpt: Don't just reset Codex rate limits for fun, it costs money. Don't just reset Codex rate limits for fun, it costs money. ... but the vibes are good ... I have reset Codex rate limits for ALL paid plans to celebrate a good week and allow everyone to build more with GPT-5.5. Enjoy

events.title: Codex rate limits reset after a 10-minute incident was mitigated
events.excerpt: Codex incident is mitigated, seeing recovery. Lasted about 10 mins, Codex itself helped with the remediation, but ultimately the insight came from a human this time. Apologies for the disruption and rate limit reset incoming.

events.title: Codex rate limits reset across all plans for its 1-year anniversary
events.excerpt: Hi! To celebrate its 1-year anniversary, I have allowed Codex to reset its own rate limits across all plans. Enjoy all the new features.

events.title: 5-hour and weekly rate limits reset after an Opus 4.7 long-context bug
events.excerpt: We fixed a bug where rate limits on Claude subscriptions weren't properly adjusted for long context requests in Opus 4.7. We've reset 5-hour and weekly rate limits. Enjoy Opus 4.7!

events.title: Codex limits reset alongside the $100 ChatGPT plan launch
events.excerpt: We did it, say hi to the $100 plan! It should be the sweet spot for a ton of you. It comes with a ton of codex usage. And yes we are resetting the limits again too as I mentioned yesterday. Let’s keep building!

events.title: 2x Codex usage promo extended to May 31 for $200 Pro users, with a rate-limit reset
events.excerpt: Our existing $200 Pro tier still remains our highest usage option. And as a thank you to our existing Pro users on the $200 tier, we’re extending our 2x Codex usage promo (until May 31st) and we’ve reset your Codex rate limits (yes, again).

events.title: Codex rate limits reset for 3 million weekly users, with a reset promised per additional 1M
events.excerpt: Three million people are now using Codex weekly - up from two million a little under a month ago. Incredible to see the growth. Thank you to all of you and to the ecosystem we’re part of. To celebrate, we’re resetting rate limits so you can keep building, and we’ll reset them every additional 1M users until we reach 10M, so we can keep celebrating along the way. Enjoy and thank you!

events.title: Codex usage limits reset for all plans after elevated rate-limit hits
events.excerpt: Our Codex dashboards are showing increased rate of users hitting rate limits and since we don't fully understand why I have made the cautious decision of resetting the usage limits for all plans. Enjoy. I also wanted to celebrate us finding a pocket of fraudulent accounts that we banned and have helped us regain some compute. The fight against abuse never stops, but it's important to mark the moment and make it a little shared victory.

events.title: Codex usage limits reset across all plans for the plugins launch
events.excerpt: Hello. We have reset Codex usage limits across all plans to let everyone experiment with the magnificent plugins we just launched, and because it had been a while! You can just build unlimited things with Codex. Have fun!

events.title: Codex rate limits reset once the service was back and stable
events.excerpt: OK, Codex is back and stable and we should be good for a while. Reset button pressed, should see it in a bit

events.title: Codex rate limits reset after the outage was fully resolved
events.excerpt: This codex issue is now fully resolved and stable for the last couple of hours. You have come to expect it, but yes, that means we will be reseting rate limits in a bit. Enjoy.

events.title: Codex rate limits reset for Plus and Pro during a usage-drain investigation
events.excerpt: We don’t have evidence of a widespread issue with codex usage being drained faster than it should but there are enough reports and we have reset rate limits for plus & pro subscriptions while we work towards wrapping up our investigation over the coming 1-3 days.

events.title: Codex rate limits reset for Plus and Pro after a 2X promo bug missed ~9% of users
events.excerpt: We caught an issue that was causing the 2X promotional increase in limits to not be applied to an estimated 9% of plus and pro users for Codex. We have now fixed this issue and are reseting the rate limit for all plus and pro users to compensate. Apologies and thank you for the bug reports over the last couple of days.

events.title: Codex rate limits reset after requests were wrongly blocked as high cyber risk
events.excerpt: Codex is back up. We introduced an issue that caused requests to be blocked and rejected as high cyber risk. This was fixed in ~8 mins and we are now back online and fully operational. Team will reset rate limits, that’s been a while. Enjoy one on us.
